Vt({autoplay:!1,frameRate:30,onUpdate:s=>{let i=s.deltaTime,n=this.prevScrollX,o=this.prevScrollY,r=this.scrollX,l=this.scrollY,a=n-r,c=o-l;this.prevScrollX=r,this.prevScrollY=l,a&&(this.backwardX=n>r),c&&(this.backwardY=o>l),this.velocity=z(i>0?Math.sqrt(a*a+c*c)/i:0,5)}}).init(),this.resizeTicker=new Vt({autoplay:!1,duration:250*$.timeScale,onComplete:()=>{this.updateWindowBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll()}}).init(),this.wakeTicker=new currentTime(t){let s=t*($.timeScale===1?1:Ht);this.forEach(i=>{!this.persist&&s>=this.duration&&i.play(),i.currentTime=s})}get progress(){return this.currentTime/this.duration}set progress(t){this.forEach(s=>s.currentTime=t*this.duration||0)}resume(){return this.paused?(this.paused=!1,this.forEach("play")):this}pause(){return this.paused?this:(this.paused=!0,this.forEach("pause"))}alternate(){return this.reversed=!this.reversed,this.forEach("reverse"),this.paused&&this.forEach("pause"),this}play(){return this.reversed&&this.alternate(),this.resume()}reverse(){return this.reversed||this.alternate(),this.resume()}seek(t,s=!1){return s&&(this.muteCallbacks=!0),t<this.duration&&(this.completed=!1),this.currentTime=t,this.muteCallbacks=!1,this.paused&&this.pause(),this}restart(){return this.completed=!1,this.seek(0,!0).resume()}commitStyles(){return this.forEach("commitStyles")}complete(){return this.seek(this.duration)}cancel(){return this.muteCallbacks=!0,this.commitStyles().forEach("cancel"),this.animations.length=0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.targets.forEach(t=>{t.style.transform==="none"&&t.style.removeProperty("transform")})}),this}revert(){return r=n[o];S(r)||r===xt?i.removeProperty(Me(o)):t.style[o]=r}t.getAttribute("style")===xt&&t.removeAttribute("style")}),this}then(t=M){let 0,l=`#${o.hash.split("#")[1]}`;this.scrollTo(l,r);return}}if(this.options.stopInertiaOnNavigate&&i.some(r=>n.host===r.host&&n.pathname!==r.pathname)){this.reset();return}};onPointerDown=e=>{e.button===1&&this.reset()};onVirtualScroll=e=>{if(typeof this.options.virtualScroll=="function"&&this.options.virtualScroll(e)===!1)return;let{deltaX:t,deltaY:s,event:i}=e;if(this.emitter.emit("virtual-scroll",{deltaX:t,deltaY:s,event:i}),i.ctrlKey||i.lenisStopPropagation)return;let n=i.type.includes("touch"),o=i.type.includes("wheel");this.isTouching=i.type==="touchstart"||i.type==="touchmove";let r=t===0&&s===0;if(this.options.syncTouch&&n&&i.type==="touchstart"&&r&&!this.isStopped&&!this.isLocked){this.reset();return}let a=this.options.gestureOrientation==="vertical"&&s===0||this.options.gestureOrientation==="horizontal"&&t===0;if(r||a)return;let c=i.composedPath();c=c.slice(0,c.indexOf(this.rootElement));let u=this.options.prevent,p=Math.abs(t)>=Math.abs(s)?"horizontal":"vertical";if(c.find(v=>v instanceof HTMLElement&&(typeof u=="function"&&u?.(v)||v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent")||p==="vertical"&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-vertical")||p==="horizontal"&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-horizontal")||n&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-touch")||o&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-wheel")||this.options.allowNestedScroll&&this.hasNestedScroll(v,{deltaX:t,deltaY:s}))))return;if(this.isStopped||this.isLocked){i.cancelable&&i.preventDefault();return}if(!(this.options.syncTouch&&n||this.options.smoothWheel&&o)){this.isScrolling="native",this.animate.stop(),i.lenisStopPropagation=!0;return}let T=s;this.options.gestureOrientation==="both"?T=Math.abs(s)>Math.abs(t)?s:t:this.options.gestureOrientation==="horizontal"&&(T=t),(!this.options.overscroll||this.options.infinite||this.options.wrapper!==window&&this.limit>0&&(this.animatedScroll>0&&this.animatedScroll<this.limit||this.animatedScroll===0&&s>0||this.animatedScroll===this.limit&&s<0))&&(i.lenisStopPropagation=!0),i.cancelable&&i.preventDefault();let y=n&&this.options.syncTouch,f=n&&i.type==="touchend";f&&(T=Math.sign(this.velocity)*Math.abs(this.velocity)**this.options.touchInertiaExponent),this.scrollTo(this.targetScroll+T,{programmatic:!1,...y?{lerp:f?this.options.syncTouchLerp:1}:{lerp:this.options.lerp,duration:this.options.duration,easing:this.options.easing}})};resize(){this.dimensions.resize(),this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.emit()}emit(){this.emitter.emit("scroll",this)}onNativeScroll=()=>{if(this._resetVelocityTimeout!==null&&(clearTimeout(this._resetVelocityTimeout),this._resetVelocityTimeout=null),this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent){this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!1;return}if(this.isScrolling===!1||this.isScrolling==="native"){let e=this.animatedScroll;this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=this.animatedScroll-e,this.direction=Math.sign(this.animatedScroll-e),this.isStopped||(this.isScrolling="native"),this.emit(),this.velocity!==0&&(this._resetVelocityTimeout=setTimeout(()=>{this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=0,this.isScrolling=!1,this.emit()},400))}};reset(){this.isLocked=!1,this.isScrolling=!1,this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.lastVelocity=this.velocity=0,this.animate.stop()}start(){if(this.isStopped){if(this.options.autoToggle){this.rootElement.style.removeProperty("overflow");return}this.internalStart()}}internalStart(){this.isStopped&&(this.reset(),this.isStopped=!1,this.emit())}stop(){if(!this.isStopped){if(this.options.autoToggle){this.rootElement.style.setProperty("overflow","clip");return}this.internalStop()}}internalStop(){this.isStopped||(this.reset(),this.isStopped=!0,this.emit())}raf=e=>{let t=e-(this.time||e);this.time=e,this.animate.advance(t*.001),this.options.autoRaf&&(this._rafId=requestAnimationFrame(this.raf))};scrollTo(e,{offset:t=0,immediate:s=!1,lock:i=!1,programmatic:n=!0,lerp:o=n?this.options.lerp:void 0,duration:r=n?this.options.duration:void 0,easing:l=n?this.options.easing:void 0,onStart:a,onComplete:c,force:u=!1,userData:p}={}){if((this.isStopped||this.isLocked)&&!u)return;let d=e,T=t;if(typeof d=="string"&&["top","left","start","#"].includes(d))d=0;else if(typeof d=="string"&&["bottom","right","end"].includes(d))d=this.limit;else{let y=null;if(typeof d=="string"?(y=document.querySelector(d),y||(d==="#top"?d=0:console.warn("Lenis: Target not found",d))):d instanceof HTMLElement&&d?.nodeType&&(y=d),y){if(this.options.wrapper!==window){let f=this.rootElement.getBoundingClientRect();T-=this.isHorizontal?f.left:f.top}let h=y.getBoundingClientRect();d=(this.isHorizontal?h.left:h.top)+this.animatedScroll}}if(typeof d=="number"){if(d+=T,d=Math.round(d),this.options.infinite){if(n){this.targetScroll=this.animatedScroll=this.scroll;let y=d-this.animatedScroll;y>this.limit/2?d-=this.limit:y<-this.limit/2&&(d+=this.limit)}}else d=Lo(0,d,this.limit);if(d===this.targetScroll){a?.(this),c?.(this);return}if(this.userData=p??{},s){this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=d,this.setScroll(this.scroll),this.reset(),this.preventNextNativeScrollEvent(),this.emit(),c?.(this),this.userData={},requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.dispatchScrollendEvent()});return}n||(this.targetScroll=d),typeof r=="number"&&typeof l!="function"?l=Ro:typeof l=="function"&&typeof r!="number"&&(r=1),this.animate.fromTo(this.animatedScroll,d,{duration:r,easing:l,lerp:o,onStart:()=>{i&&(this.isLocked=!0),this.isScrolling="smooth",a?.(this)},onUpdate:(y,h)=>{this.isScrolling="smooth",this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=y-this.animatedScroll,this.direction=Math.sign(this.velocity),this.animatedScroll=y,this.setScroll(this.scroll),n&&(this.targetScroll=y),h||this.emit(),h&&(this.reset(),this.emit(),c?.(this),this.userData={},requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.dispatchScrollendEvent()}),this.preventNextNativeScrollEvent())}})}}preventNextNativeScrollEvent(){this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!1})}hasNestedScroll(e,{deltaX:t,deltaY:s}){let i=Date.now();e._lenis||(e._lenis={});let n=e._lenis,o,r,l,a,c,u,p,d,T,y;if(i-(n.time??0)>2e3){n.time=Date.now();let A=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(n.computedStyle=A,o=["auto","overlay","scroll"].includes(A.overflowX),r=["auto","overlay","scroll"].includes(A.overflowY),c=["auto"].includes(A.overscrollBehaviorX),u=["auto"].includes(A.overscrollBehaviorY),n.hasOverflowX=o,n.hasOverflowY=r,!(o||r))return!1;p=e.scrollWidth,d=e.scrollHeight,T=e.clientWidth,y=e.clientHeight,l=p>T,a=d>y,n.isScrollableX=l,n.isScrollableY=a,n.scrollWidth=p,n.scrollHeight=d,n.clientWidth=T,n.clientHeight=y,n.hasOverscrollBehaviorX=c,n.hasOverscrollBehaviorY=u}else l=n.isScrollableX,a=n.isScrollableY,o=n.hasOverflowX,r=n.hasOverflowY,p=n.scrollWidth,d=n.scrollHeight,T=n.clientWidth,y=n.clientHeight,c=n.hasOverscrollBehaviorX,u=n.hasOverscrollBehaviorY;if(!(o&&l||r&&a))return!1;let h=Math.abs(t)>=Math.abs(s)?"horizontal":"vertical",f,v,w,_,b,E;if(h==="horizontal")f=Math.round(e.scrollLeft),v=p-T,w=t,_=o,b=l,E=c;else if(h==="vertical")f=Math.round(e.scrollTop),v=d-y,w=s,_=r,b=a,E=u;else return!1;return!E&&(f>=v||f<=0)?!0:(w>0?f<v:f>0)&&_&&b}get rootElement(){return this.options.wrapper===window?document.documentElement:this.options.wrapper}get limit(){return this.options.naiveDimensions?this.isHorizontal?this.rootElement.scrollWidth-this.rootElement.clientWidth:this.rootElement.scrollHeight-this.rootElement.clientHeight:this.dimensions.limit[this.isHorizontal?"x":"y"]}get isHorizontal(){return this.options.orientation==="horizontal"}get actualScroll(){let e=this.options.wrapper;return this.isHorizontal?e.scrollX??e.scrollLeft:e.scrollY??e.scrollTop}get scroll(){return this.options.infinite?Or(this.animatedScroll,this.limit):this.animatedScroll}get progress(){return this.limit===0?1:this.scroll/this.limit}get isScrolling(){return this._isScrolling}set isScrolling(e){this._isScrolling!==e&&(this._isScrolling=e,this.updateClassName())}get isStopped(){return this._isStopped}set isStopped(e){this._isStopped!==e&&(this._isStopped=e,this.updateClassName())}get isLocked(){return this._isLocked}set isLocked(e){this._isLocked!==e&&(this._isLocked=e,this.updateClassName())}get isSmooth(){return this.isScrolling==="smooth"}get className(){let e="lenis";return this.options.autoToggle&&(e+=" lenis-autoToggle"),this.isStopped&&(e+=" lenis-stopped"),this.isLocked&&(e+=" lenis-locked"),this.isScrolling&&(e+=" lenis-scrolling"),this.isScrolling==="smooth"&&(e+=" lenis-smooth"),e}updateClassName(){this.cleanUpClassName(),this.rootElement.className=`${this.rootElement.className} ${this.className}`.trim()}cleanUpClassName(){this.rootElement.className=this.rootElement.className.replace(/lenis(-\w+)?/g,"").trim()}};var ys=[],ms=new Set,ei=null,gs=!1;function Ao(){ei=new Po({infinite:!0,smoothTouch:!0,syncTouch:!0,touchMultiplier:1.5});function e(o){ei.raf(o),requestAnimationFrame(e)}requestAnimationFrame(e),ei.scrollTo(0,{immediate:!0});let t=Fi(.67,0,.27,1),s=Hi("body");if(gs){n();return}else i();console.log(gs);function i(){te({defaults:{duration:700,ease:t}}).add(".intro_title",{translateX:(r,l)=>l===0?["100%","0%"]:["-100%","0%"],duration:500,delay:250},0).add(".intro_center",{translateX:(r,l)=>{let a=r.getBoundingClientRect(),c=parseFloat(getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).fontSize)*.875;return l===0?-(a.left-c):window.innerWidth-a.right-c}},750).add(".intro",{opacity:0,duration:250})}function n(){document.querySelector(".home_list").querySelectorAll(".home_item").forEach((l,a)=>{let c=a%2===0,u=Oi({target:l,repeat:!1,onEnter:()=>{gs&&(ms.has(l)||(ms.add(l),Qt(l,{filter:["blur(20px)","blur(0px)"],duration:750,ease:t})))},onEnterBackward:()=>{gs&&(ms.has(l)||(ms.add(l),Qt(l,{filter:["blur(20px)","blur(0px)"],duration:750,ease:t})))}});ys.push(u)})}document.querySelectorAll(".home_cms--link").forEach(o=>{let r=o.querySelector(".home_flw--crs");o.addEventListener("mousemove",l=>{let a=o.getBoundingClientRect(),c=r.getBoundingClientRect(),u=c.width/2,p=c.height/2,d=Math.min(Math.max(l.clientX-a.left,u),a.width-u),T=Math.min(Math.max(l.clientY-a.top,p),a.height-p);r.style.transform=`translate(${d-u}px, ${T-p}px)`}),o.addEventListener("mouseenter",()=>{Qt(r,{opacity:1,duration:800,ease:"inOut(1.68)"})}),o.addEventListener("mouseleave",()=>{Qt(r,{opacity:0,duration:800,ease:"inOut(1.68)"})})})}function zr(){ys.forEach(e=>e.revert()),ys=[],document.querySelectorAll(".home_item").forEach((e,t)=>{let s=t%2===0;e.style.clipPath=s?"inset(0% 100% 100% 0%)":"inset(0% 0% 100% 100%)"})}function ko(){ei.destroy(),gs=!0,ys.forEach(e=>e.revert()),ys=[],ms.clear(),document.querySelectorAll(".home_list:not(.is-clone) .home_item").forEach((e,t)=>{let s=t%2===0;e.style.clipPath=s?"inset(0% 100% Oo(){let e=[".work_title"],t=te(),s=1e3,i=10;e.forEach(a=>{Ee.$(a).forEach(c=>{let u=Oe(c,{words:{wrap:"clip"}});t.add(u.words,{y:["100%","0%"],duration:s,ease:"out(3)",delay:ve(i)},0).init()})});let n=new AbortController,{signal:o}=n,r=document.querySelectorAll(".work_item"),l=null;r.forEach(a=>{a.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.remove("is-active");let c=a.querySelector(".work_thumb--holder"),u=a.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb");c&&(c.style.display="none"),u.forEach(p=>p.style.opacity="0")}),r.forEach(a=>{a.addEventListener("mouseover",()=>{a.classList.contains("off")||a!==l&&(l&&(l.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.remove("is-active"),Qt(l.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb"),{opacity:0,duration:300,ease:"outQuad"}),Qt(l.querySelector(".work_thumb--holder"),{display:"none",filter:["blur(0px)","blur(20px)"],duration:0})),a.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.add("is-active"),Qt(a.querySelector(".work_thumb--holder"),{display:"block",filter:["blur(20px)","blur(0px)"],duration:0}),Qt(a.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb"),{opacity:1,duration:300,ease:"outQuad"}),l=a)},{signal:o})})}function Fo(){let e=[".content_title",".content_desc p"],t=te(),s=1e3,i=10;e.forEach(r=>{Ee.$(r).forEach(l=>{let c=n[(l+1)%o];c.style.display="block"}}),document.querySelectorAll("video").forEach(r=>{r.muted=!0,r.playsInline=!0,r.loop=!0})}"scrollRestoration"in history&&(history.scrollRestoration="manual");function Vo(){document.querySelector("#time").textContent=new Date().toLocaleTimeString("en-GB",{timeZone:"Europe/London",hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"})}Vo();setInterval(Vo,1e3);var Ki=class extends de{onLeave({from:t,done:s}){t.animate([{opacity:1},{opacity:0}],{duration:400,easing:"ease",fill:"forwards"}).finished.then(s)}onEnter({to:t,done:s}){t.animate([{opacity:0},{opacity:1}],{duration:400,easing:"ease",fill:"forwards"}).finished.then(s)}},Gi=class extends fe{initialLoad(){this.onEnter()}onEnter(){this.content.querySelectorAll("video[autoplay]").forEach(s=>{s.play().catch(()=>{})}),document.body.scrollTop=0,document.documentElement.scrollTop=0,window.scrollTo(0,0);let t=window.location.pathname;t==="/"&&Ao(),t.includes("about")&&Do(),t.includes("/work")&&Oo(),t.includes("work/")&&Fo()}onLeaveCompleted(){window.location.pathname==="/"&&ko()}},ou=new Fe({transitions:{default:Ki},renderers:{default:Gi}});})();
